_comment: Per-domain classification overrides. Used by daily_intercom_report.py to force a region or type for specific domains.
_region_values: Either 'AU' or 'UK' to hard-force a region. Omit to use the default region chain (Intercom IP -> email TLD -> HubSpot).
_type_values: Either 'Publisher' or 'Advertiser'. Hard override — wins over HubSpot pipeline/owner/publisher_size signals.
_note: Global agencies (Dentsu, WPP etc) now only need a type override — region falls through to Intercom IP which correctly identifies the user's actual office.
